bird.name: 花脸硬尾鸭
bird.summary: 花脸硬尾鸭（学名：Nomonyx dominicus）是雁形目鸭科的一种鸟类。 特征 花脸硬尾鸭体重约364.97克，翼长约138.1毫米，嘴峰长约39.6毫米，喙宽度约16.2毫米，喙厚度约11.2毫米，跗蹠长约24.1毫米，尾长约85.8毫米。花脸硬尾鸭是部分迁徙的鸟类，其…

relations.subject: 花脸硬尾鸭
relations.evidence: As of 2000, the conservation status for masked ducks in Texas is 3,800 birds. On April 1, 1962, it was recorded from Lowndes County, Georgia, where it was photographed by Alexander Wetmore. Masked ducks breed in any freshwater body with marsh vegetation and surrounded by heavy tree cover
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
